summary:
There is no available evidence linking istiratumab to pancreatic cancer treatments, as it does not appear in任何 documented clinical trial databases or therapeutic classifications related to oncology. Thus, istiratumab should not currently be used for pancreatic cancer due to lack of validated clinical data.  
$\boxed{B}$
